page_summary: A page of text written in a fictional/constructed script with a large calligraphic word centered as a title or heading, surrounded by paragraphs of smaller text.
text_blocks: First paragraph (top, ~7 lines): A block of text in the constructed script, reading top to bottom, right to left per line, with bullet/dot markers at the start of several lines.
Second paragraph (~3 lines): Shorter paragraph below the first, also with a bullet marker.
Third paragraph (~4 lines): Medium-length paragraph below the second.
Large centered word: A single large calligraphic word in the middle of the page serving as a heading/title.
Final paragraph (bottom, ~10 lines): The longest block at the bottom of the page, with bullet markers.

symbols.description: A character resembling the Hebrew letter פ (pe) with extended descender
symbols.position: throughout text blocks, especially prominent in the large centered word
symbols.size_estimate: small (line height) in paragraphs, large in the centered title

symbols.description: Characters resembling Hebrew ה, ז, ח, ס combined with dots and circles

symbols.position: at the start of multiple lines and at line breaks throughout all paragraphs

uncertain_or_unreadable: The script appears to be a constructed/cipher alphabet that I cannot decode; the actual linguistic content of all text blocks is unreadable.
The large centered title is in a calligraphic version of the same script and its meaning is unknown.
